section1.title: 1. What are Cookies
section1.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. Cookies help the platform remember your preferences and improve your user experience.

subsection1.title: 2.1. Essential Cookies
subsection1.content: These cookies are necessary for the platform to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually set in response to actions made by you, such as logging in or filling in forms.

list.item1: Session cookies to maintain your login session
list.item2: Security cookies to protect against fraud
list.item3: Preference cookies to save your settings

subsection2.title: 2.2. Functional Cookies
subsection2.content: These cookies allow the platform to remember your choices and provide enhanced features:

subsection3.title: 2.3. Analytical Cookies
subsection3.content: These cookies help us understand how visitors use the platform, allowing us to improve functionality and user experience:

section3.title: 3. Purposes of Cookie Usage
section3.content: We use cookies for the following purposes:

list.item4: Analyzing platform usage to improve service
list.item5: Ensuring correct operation of all features

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
section4.content: Some cookies may be set by third-party services we use on the platform. These may include:
section4.note: These third-party services have their own privacy and cookie policies. We recommend reviewing their policies.

subsection1.title: 5.1. Browser Settings
subsection1.content: Most browsers allow you to manage cookies through settings. You can:

list.item4: Receive notifications before cookies are set

subsection1.note: Please note that disabling cookies may affect platform functionality and your user experience.

subsection2.title: 5.2. Platform Settings
subsection2.content: You can manage some cookies through your account settings on the platform. Access to settings is available in the profile section.

list.item1: Session Cookies — deleted when you close your browser
list.item2: Persistent Cookies — remain on your device for a specific period or until manually deleted

section7.title: 7. Compliance with US Law
section7.content: The use of cookies on the platform complies with US legal requirements, including Federal Trade Commission (FTC) requirements and specific California state requirements (CCPA), where applicable.
section7.note: We adhere to principles of transparency and provide users with the ability to manage cookie usage in accordance with legal requirements.

section8.title: 8. Cookie Policy Updates
section8.content: We may update this Cookie Policy. We will notify you of significant changes via the platform or email.

section9.title: 9. Contact Information
section9.content: For questions related to cookie usage, you can contact us via the feedback form on the platform or by email.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.content: REXTEN Marketplace takes your privacy seriously. This privacy policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it in accordance with US law, including the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and other applicable data protection laws.

section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
section3.content: We use collected data for the following purposes:

list.item1: Providing access to the platform and its features
list.item2: Processing bookings and managing your orders
list.item3: Communicating with you regarding bookings and services
list.item4: Improving platform quality and user experience

subsection1.title: 4.1. Sharing with Service Providers
subsection1.content: When booking a service, we share necessary information with the service provider to fulfill the booking:

subsection2.title: 4.2. Sharing with Service Vendors
subsection2.content: We may share data with third-party services that assist us in operating the platform (hosting, analytics, payment processing). These providers are obligated to protect your data and use it only to provide services to us.

subsection3.title: 4.3. Legal Requirements
subsection3.content: We may disclose your data if required by law or upon request by government authorities.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention
section5.content: We retain your personal data for the period necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or for the period required by law.
section5.note: Upon account deletion, we delete or anonymize your personal data, unless law requires its retention.

list.item5: Receive a copy of your data in a structured format

subsection2.title: 6.2. California Consumer Rights (CCPA)
subsection2.content: If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the CCPA:

list.item1: Right to know what personal data is collected and how it is used
list.item2: Right to know if your data is sold to third parties
list.item3: Right to opt-out of the sale of personal data
list.item4: Right to non-discrimination for exercising your rights
list.item5: Right to delete personal data (with some exceptions)

subsection2.note: To exercise your rights, including CCPA rights, contact us via the feedback form on the platform or use the dedicated CCPA request form.

section7.title: 7. Data Security
section7.content: We implement modern technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction:

list.item3: Restricted access to data only for authorized employees
list.item4: Regular monitoring and updating of security systems

section8.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
section8.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve platform performance, analyze usage, and personalize content. Detailed information about cookies is available in our Cookie Policy.
section8.note: In accordance with US legal requirements, we provide the ability to manage cookies through browser settings and cookie usage notifications.

section9.title: 9. Children's Privacy (COPPA)
section9.content: Our platform is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13 without parental consent in accordance with COPPA (Children's Online Privacy Protection Act).
section9.note: If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us to remove such information.

section10.title: 10. Changes to Privacy Policy
section10.content: We may update this Privacy Policy. We will notify you of significant changes via the platform or email.

section11.title: 11. Contact Information
section11.content: For questions related to personal data processing, you can contact us via the feedback form on the platform or by email.
section11.note: For requests related to California consumer rights (CCPA), use the special form on the platform or contact us directly with 'CCPA Request' in the subject line.

section1.title: 1. General Provisions
section1.content1: Welcome to the REXTEN Marketplace platform — a service marketplace connecting clients and service providers in the US. By using our service, you agree to these Terms of Service, governed by US law.
section1.content2: The REXTEN Marketplace platform provides the ability to search, book, and receive various services from businesses and professionals registered on the platform. These terms apply to all platform users, including residents of all US states, including California.

subsection1.title: 2.1. Client Registration
subsection1.content: To use the platform as a client, you can:

list.item1: Register an account by providing accurate information
list.item2: Use the platform without registration to browse services and book
Not transfer account credentials to third parties
list.item3: Comply with platform rules and legislation
list.item4: Not use the platform for illegal purposes

subsection1.title: 3.1. Service Search
subsection1.content: The platform provides service search capabilities by various criteria: categories, location, rating, price, and other parameters.

subsection2.title: 3.2. Booking
subsection2.content: When booking a service, you agree to the terms specified by the service provider. Booking creates obligations between you and the service provider. The platform acts only as an intermediary facilitating search and booking.

subsection3.title: 3.3. Booking Cancellation
subsection3.content: Cancellation terms are determined by the specific service provider's policy. We recommend checking cancellation terms before confirming a booking.

section4.title: 4. Review System
section4.content: After receiving a service, you can leave a review about the service quality. Reviews must:

list.item1: Be based on actual service experience
list.item3: Not contain insults, defamation, or false information

section4.note: The platform reserves the right to moderate and remove reviews violating usage rules.

subsection1.title: 5.1. Platform Liability
subsection1.content: REXTEN Marketplace provides a platform for interaction between clients and service providers. The platform is not responsible for the quality of services provided, actions of service providers, or results of service usage.

subsection2.title: 5.2. User Liability
subsection2.content: You are responsible for the accuracy of provided information, compliance with booking terms, and timely payment for services (if applicable).

subsection3.title: 5.3. Service Provider Liability
subsection3.content: The service provider is fully responsible for the quality of services provided, compliance with agreements, and fulfillment of obligations to the client.

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
section6.content: All platform materials, including design, text, images, logos, and software, are intellectual property of REXTEN Marketplace or used with permission of rights holders.
section6.note: Use of platform materials without written permission is prohibited, except as provided by law.

section7.title: 7. Modification of Terms
section7.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via the platform or email.
section7.note: Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

section8.title: 8. Contact Information
section8.content: For questions related to Terms of Service, you can contact us via the feedback form on the platform or by email.
